name: oc
description: Codex plugin for delegating work to the opencode CLI (opencode run).

interface.shortDescription: Delegate review and rescue workflows to the opencode CLI
interface.longDescription: Use opencode from Codex to run setup checks, review current git changes, delegate bounded rescue tasks, and inspect background job results through the shared companion runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use opencode to review this change
Delegate a bounded rescue task to opencode
